news.title: Oil Prices Continue to Climb
news.summary: Oil prices ticked upward for a third consecutive day, as the U.S. and Iran wrestle over control in the Strait of Hormuz. In recent days, the U.S. has reimposed a blockade on Iranian ships in the strait, after retreating from a plan to charge other countries a 20% fee for protecting their ships through the passage.
